concerns.text: Tasks T034-T036 implement User Story 4 (Real-World Evaluation) which is NOT present in spec.md. The spec only defines US1-US3. While plan.md introduces FR-010/US4, the tasks document must not silently expand scope beyond the spec's acceptance criteria without explicit spec amendment. This violates the constraint that tasks must not relax or silently expand what the spec demands.

Task T032 implements 'theoretical lower bound calculation' but lacks the specific analytical noise model ($\Delta^2/12$) mandated by FR-008 and plan.md. The task description is too generic ('analytical noise floor') and risks implementing a simplified or incorrect model, failing the 'independent ground truth' constraint required to avoid circular validation.

FR-001 and plan.md require generating 'attention trajectories' (sequences with temporal drift) and using 'four input features' (mean, variance, skewness, kurtosis). T013/T014 describe generating 'synthetic attention trajectories' but T014 only mentions 'ground-truth label computation' without explicitly mandating the extraction of all four moments (skew/kurt) required by FR-002. This risks a semantic weakening where the data generation only produces mean/var, making the 4-input MLP impossible to train as specified.

FR-006 and SC-004 mandate a paired t-test on '30 independent runs (n=30)'. Task T031 mentions 'statistical significance test (paired t-test, n=30 runs)' but does not explicitly link this to the 'accumulated KL-divergence' metric defined in FR-004. Without this explicit link, the task could be interpreted as testing per-step error rather than the accumulated error, violating the long-horizon constraint.

FR-005 and Constitution Principle VII require isolating the 'overhead of the iterative optimization step'. Task T030 ('Implement wall-clock profiling') does not explicitly mandate subtracting the baseline inference time to isolate the optimization cost. This risks measuring total latency rather than the specific optimization reduction, violating the hardware-aware profiling constraint.
